problem id: d9ae48ad
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHL(6)

examples:
  10110001 -> 11011000
  10101010 -> 11010101
  11111111 -> 11111111
  11001011 -> 11100101
  01101111 -> 11110111
  00011100 -> 00001110
  01101110 -> 10110111
  00010000 -> 00001000

query: 11100000
predicted answer: 01110000
